markdown:
The current corpus contains 5 papers:

1. **Language Models are Few-Shot Learners** — Tom B. Brown et al., NeurIPS 2020 (arXiv: 2005.14165)
2. **Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners** — Alec Radford et al., OpenAI technical report, 2019
3. **BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding** — Jacob Devlin, Ming-Wei Chang et al., NAACL 2018 (arXiv: 1810.04805)
4. **Attention Is All You Need** — Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer et al., NeurIPS 2017 (arXiv: 1706.03762)
5. **Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization** — Diederik P. Kingma, Jimmy Ba, ICLR 2014 (arXiv: 1412.6980)
